## Checklist

- [ ] My branch is up to date with `main` (I pulled `main` before opening this)
- [ ] Commits have clear messages, and co-authors are credited if I paired
- [ ] I did NOT hand-edit generated files (`TunerConstants.java`)
- [ ] I updated docs if behavior or constants changed
